command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT contract_no, status, approve_date, customer_name, product_type, finance_amount, installment_count
FROM contracts 
WHERE contract_no = 'CT0825-KPT001-14727-01' AND section = 'Fastfone365';

rows.customer_name: ศิริลักษณ์ เฉลิชาติ
